description_long: This is a high-heeled sandal featuring a thick, block heel and a single wide strap across the toe area. The shoe has an open-toe design and an ankle strap that forms a circular band above the heel, likely for fastening around the ankle. The overall silhouette is sleek and modern, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The material appears to be a smooth, possibly satin or leather-like fabric, giving it a matte black finish. The heel is substantial, providing both height and stability, while the footbed is gently contoured. There are no visible logos, embellishments, or laces, emphasizing its simple yet elegant style.
description: A sleek, black high-heeled sandal with a block heel, open toe, and circular ankle strap, crafted from a smooth material.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the circular ankle strap and the solid block heel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick heel, open toe, and the single wide toe strap.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the open toe and the wide strap across the front of the foot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the block heel and the clean, minimalist profile.
